audience: investment banking, AI industry research, financial analysis

final_format.type: report-cover | long-image-background | ppt-cover | ppt-section | video-scene | style-exploration

visual_style.tone: restrained, professional, evidence-first, high information density
visual_style.lighting: clean editorial lighting, not cinematic darkness
visual_style.composition: clear focal area with reserved whitespace for post-production text

safe_areas.text_overlay_area: left third or upper-left quadrant, low visual noise
safe_areas.chart_overlay_area: lower third if needed, plain surface behind chart
safe_areas.do_not_cover: future source notes, captions, chart labels, and key figures

forbidden_elements: company logos unless supplied and licensed
negative_constraints: no tiny unreadable glyphs pretending to be data
no decorative elements competing with exact overlays
verification_checklist: no generated text or numbers are treated as evidence
